metadata.siteDescription: Discover premium nightlife events and standout venues with NightGate.

footer.description: Your premium pass to the city's best nightlife. Discover events, venues, and experiences that hit different.
footer.tagline: Built for the night. Designed for the experience.

hero.description: Discover the city's most exclusive events and premium venues. From underground raves to rooftop sessions, every night is legendary.

featuredEvents.label: Tonight & This Weekend
featuredEvents.title: Featured
featuredEvents.subtitle: The most anticipated nights, handpicked for those who know how to live.

topVenues.label: Best In The City
topVenues.title: Top
topVenues.subtitle: Spaces with personality. These aren't just clubs, they're experiences.

popularNow.label: Trending
popularNow.title: Popular
popularNow.subtitle: What everyone's talking about this week.

howItWorks.label: The NightGate Way
howItWorks.title: How It
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting to the best night of your life takes exactly four steps.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Browse curated events and premium venues filtered by vibe, date, and city. No algorithm, just quality picks.

book.title: Book
book.description: Secure your ticket in seconds. VIP tables, guest list spots, or general admission, all in one tap.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Show up, scan your pass, and lose yourself. We handle the logistics. You handle the memories.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Every venue is verified. Every event is real. Your payment is protected with bank-grade security.

ctaBanner.description: Join 98,000+ night owls who never miss a beat. Get early access, exclusive drops, and VIP alerts.

metadata.title: Events
metadata.description: Browse all events. Filter by category, price, and date.

eventsPage.title: Discover
eventsPage.description: Every event, every vibe, every night. Filter and find exactly what you're looking for.

venuesPage.title: Premium
venuesPage.description: Not just clubs, experiences. Rooftops, underground bunkers, velvet lounges, and everything in between.

evt-001.title: NEON CATHEDRAL
evt-001.description: An immersive audio-visual journey through dark techno landscapes. Six rooms, twelve artists, one cathedral of sound.

evt-002.title: PINK FREQUENCY
evt-002.description: Rooftop house music as the city glitters below. Deep, funky house cuts under an open sky.

evt-003.title: BABYLON NIGHTS
evt-003.description: The most exclusive R&B night in the city. VIP tables, champagne service, and the hottest vibes.

evt-004.title: ULTRA VIOLET
evt-004.description: UV-lit warehouse rave with full LED production. Lose yourself in the ultraviolet frequency.

evt-005.title: VELVET LOUNGE
evt-005.description: Intimate velvet-draped lounge with curated pop sets, signature cocktails and a killer view.

evt-006.title: LATIN HEAT
evt-006.description: The hottest Latin night this side of the equator. Reggaeton, salsa, and merengue til sunrise.

evt-007.title: MIDNIGHT GOSPEL
evt-007.description: A spiritual experience. Minimal techno meets experimental sound design in this late-night sermon.

evt-008.title: DEEP SPACE
evt-008.description: Afro and deep house on the rooftop as the stars come out. Free entry before midnight.

evt-009.title: HIP HOP SANCTUARY
evt-009.description: The ultimate hip-hop experience. From boom bap classics to current trap bangers.

ven-001.name: Fabric Underground
ven-001.description: Legendary multi-room underground club. Dark corridors, pounding sound systems, and iconic resident DJs make this a pilgrimage for clubbers worldwide.

ven-002.name: Rooftop 42
ven-002.description: Perched on the 42nd floor with panoramic city views. Craft cocktails, deep house, and sunsets that hit different when you're above it all.

ven-003.name: The Grand
ven-003.description: The city's most exclusive address. Gold-plated bathrooms, celebrity spotting, and a sound system that costs more than your car.

ven-004.name: Arena Zero
ven-004.description: A converted industrial warehouse with Europe's largest indoor LED installation. Raw, massive, and absolutely relentless.

ven-005.name: Club Noir
ven-005.description: Velvet walls, low lighting, and curated playlists. The kind of place where you whisper secrets and the music reads your mood.

ven-006.name: Palacio
ven-006.description: A palace of Latin rhythms. Salsa classes start at 10pm, the reggaeton takes over at midnight, and the energy never drops.

ven-007.name: Skyline Club
ven-007.description: Where the city's movers and shakers unwind above the financial district. Craft cocktails and ambient soundscapes.

ven-008.name: VOID
ven-008.description: No phone policy. No frills. No mercy. VOID is for the true believers, those who come to lose themselves completely in the music.
